'''√z-g-th''' ('''kazagath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:larf|larf]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:larf|larf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √z-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazagath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizagath || jizagath || shizagath || kizagath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzagath || jujuzagath || shushuzagath || kukuzagath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzagath || juzagath || shuzagath || kuzagath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzagath || juzagath || shuzagath || kuzagath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezagath || jezagath || shezagath || kezagath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozagath || jojozagath || shoshozagath || kokozagath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozagath || jozagath || shozagath || kozagath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozagath || jozagath || shozagath || kozagath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zagath || zagath || zagath || zagath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zagath || zagath || zagath || zagath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zagath || zagath || zagath || zagath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zagath || zagath || zagath || zagath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzagath || jæzagath || shæzagath || kæzagath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazagath || jajazagath || shashazagath || kakazagath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazagath || jazagath || shazagath || kazagath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazagath || jazagath || shazagath || kazagath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazagath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazagath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazagath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazagathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazagathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazagathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazagathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazagathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazagathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazagathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazagathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazagathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazagathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazagathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazagathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazagathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazagathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazagathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazagathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazagathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazagathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazagathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazagathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazagathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazagathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazagathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazagathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazagathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazagathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazagathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazagathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazagathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazagathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazagathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazagathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazagathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazagathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazagathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazagathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazagathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazagathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazagathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazagathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazagathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazagathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazagathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazagathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazagathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazagathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazagathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazagathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazagathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazagathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazagathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazagathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazagathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazagathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazagathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazagathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazagathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazagathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazagathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazagathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
